The memo: -
Sand mining, storage and sale of sand / sand through online system by the Government.
The policy was issued under the Government Decision dated 19.04.2023. by amending this sand policy.
The revised sand policy has been issued vide Government Decision dated 16.02.2024. According to these sand policies
Collector for excavation of sand from river / basin, transportation to and from depots, creation and management of depots.
Considering the tender received at the minimum rate in the tender drawn at their level.
Sand sold online through the auction system to the tenderer by the date 20.05.2025
In proportion, as per the provisions of the rules and in proportion to the funds made available by the Finance Department.
Funds are being paid as follows: -
(Amount in Rupees)
table_trans: Payment for sand excavated and sold by date 20.05.2025
Amount to be disbursed as per this Government Memorandum (Column 3 - Column 4)

para_trans: Government Decision Number: Gaukhini - 10/0525 Q. No.84 / B-1

2. Paragraph No. The Government is approving payment of the total amount to be disbursed towards the deposit in Table 1, Rs. 3,04,59, 862 / - (Rupees Three Crore Four Lakh Sixty-Nine Thousand Eight Hundred and Sixty-two only) subject to the following terms and conditions: - The Collector shall ensure that the amount is not paid to the tenderers earlier as per their sanctioned sand depots.
The Collector shall ensure that not more than 90 per cent of the quantity of sand sold by the tenderer is paid while spending the funds sanctioned and received under this order.
3) Sand Depot holders who have violated the terms and conditions of the tender.
The Collector should take care that the funds are not paid. The conditions and conditions of which the sand depot holders
The sand depot holder who has breached the condition is fully liable if the funds are paid.
The Collector will be in charge.
4) The information of the sand depot holders who have violated the terms and conditions is correct.
These documents should be submitted to the government immediately.
5) All concerned should ensure that the sanctioned funds are not spent on works other than those sanctioned by the government.

6) All concerned shall ensure that there is no balance of funds under the head Main Account mentioned in the said order or that the funds received under the said order shall not be deposited in any Operational Bank Account / PLA (Personal Account) of the concerned authority.

7) The expenditure statements / reports in this regard should be submitted to the Government without fail. Expenditure reconciliation statements relating to the above funds should be submitted to the government without fail along with the Reconciliation Slip of the Accountant General's Office.
8) Utilization Certificate of funds disbursed under this order should be submitted immediately to the Office of the Accountant General, the concerned Collector / Divisional Commissioner / Government.
9) Further disbursement of funds without receipt of Utilisation Certificate by the Government.
Note that this will not be done.

10) The Collector shall be solely responsible for transferring the amount previously provided by the Collector to the tenderers from the District Mineral Trust Fund for the said sand depot to the District Mineral Trust.

03. Expenditure in this regard, during the financial year 2025-26 Demand No. C-01, Heading of Accounts 2853 Non-Fossil Mines and Metallurgical Industries, 02 Regulation and Development of Mines 102 - Mineral Exploration (00) (01) 06 - Industry and Metals 00 - Industry and Metals (0) (Datamat) (Index 28530188) 50 - Other expenses to be met from the grants sanctioned under this head.
04. District Mining to disburse funds from the sanctioned grants available under this head.
The officer is the "Drawing and Disbursing Officer" and the "Head of Office" as the "Additional" of the district concerned.
There will be "District Collector."

05. The said Government Memorandum is being issued as per the concurrence given under the Informal Reference No. 436/2025 Expenditure-9, dated 07/08/2025 of the Department of Finance in respect of the provision of funds by the Department of Finance.
